thag10.7:1.1: You should know what’s to your benefit.
thag10.7:1.2: You should take a good look at the Buddha’s word
thag10.7:1.4: for one who has entered on the contemplative life.
thag10.7:2.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:3.2: honoring the Dhamma as it has come to be,
thag10.7:3.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:4.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:5.1: Virtuous in what you do & what you abstain from doing,
thag10.7:5.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:6.3: right for sages to resort to:
thag10.7:6.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:7.2: investigating phenomena, mental qualities, as they have come to be:
thag10.7:7.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:8.2: inconstancy, the perception of not-self, the perception of unattractiveness,
thag10.7:8.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:9.2: the factors for awakening, the bases for success, the faculties,
thag10.7:9.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
thag10.7:10.2: should cut through the effluents, root & all,
thag10.7:10.4: This is fitting for a contemplative.
